problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and  Eligibility Analysis Platform
summary: Design a technical platform that automates tender evaluation, eligibility verification, and produces explainable reports for government procurement.
key_steps: Intelligent data extraction from various document formats
Interpretation of unstructured text against predefined eligibility criteria
Eligibility compliance evaluation using rule engine and ML models
Anomaly detection for document authenticity checks
